([Punjabi](/wiki/Punjabi_language "Punjabi language"): ਮਨਜੀਤ ਸਿੰਘ ਰਾਲ, born 24 August 1984), better known by his stage-name **Manj Musik**, is a [British Indian](/wiki/British_Indian "British Indian") composer, singer and [Filmi](/wiki/Filmi "Filmi") scorer. He was one of the music composer for the [bhangra](/wiki/Bhangra_(music) "Bhangra (music)") music group [RDB](/wiki/RDB_(band) "RDB (band)"), which was formed with his two brothers Surjeet Singh (SurjRDB) and Kuldeep Ral in 2001.

is a [Mumbai](/wiki/Mumbai "Mumbai")-based record label founded by [British Indian](/wiki/British_Indian "British Indian") singer, music director, and [producer](/wiki/Record_producer "Record producer") Manj Musik in 2014. Later renamed as Muzik ONE Global, Manj described that the label is built to give full marketing, promotions and financial support to up and coming independent artists and not the label itself.[[6]](#cite_note-6) Previously, the roster included Vee Music, Abeer Arora, the Indian hip-hop crew **KKG** (Kala Kurta Gang), consisting of rappers Sikander Kahlon, Sady Immortal and Rob C, Moyur, O2 & SRK, Mr. Richi, Sarb Smooth, Nindy Kaur, Manj Musik, and [Raftaar](/wiki/Raftaar_(rapper) "Raftaar (rapper)").
["Wish Surj well for his future career: Manj Musik"](http://www.radioandmusic.com/entertainment/editorial/news/160827-wish-surj-well-his-future-career-manj-musik). Retrieved 8 September 2017.
["RDB split causes Brothers to fight in Court"](https://www.desiblitz.com/content/rdb-split-causes-brothers-fight-court). *DESIblitz*. 15 September 2014. Retrieved 8 September 2017.
["Wish I could say Manj, me grew stronger together: Surj RDB"](http://littleindia.com/wish-say-manj-grew-stronger-together-surj-rdb/). *littleindia.com*. 3 September 2017. Retrieved 8 September 2017.
Baddhan, Raj (7 October 2014). ["Brit Asia Awards 2014: Winners list"](https://www.bizasialive.com/brit-asia-awards-2014-winners-list/). *BizAsia*. Retrieved 20 August 2020.

["Good music has no benchmarks: Manj Musik"](http://www.hindustantimes.com/music/good-music-has-no-benchmarks-manj-musik/story-oe9OVeW1VxrwWycvRchduI.html). *hindustantimes.com/*. 4 September 2016. Retrieved 8 September 2017.

Tagat, Anurag (20 October 2021). ["Manj Musik on Punjabi Pop and Hip-Hop's Global Rise and His New Song 'Kangna'"](https://rollingstoneindia.com/manj-musik-new-song-kangna-noopsta-interview/). *[Rolling Stone](/wiki/Rolling_Stone "Rolling Stone")*.

["Raftaar and Manj Musik's video 'Swag Mera Desi' out now"](https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/entertainment/punjabi/music/raftaar-and-manj-musiks-video-swag-mera-desi-out-now/articleshow/37115714.cms). *[

**Manjeet Singh Ral** ([Punjabi](/wiki/Punjabi_language "Punjabi language"): ਮਨਜੀਤ ਸਿੰਘ ਰਾਲ, born 24 August 1984), better known by his stage-name **Manj Musik**, is a [British Indian](/wiki/British_Indian "British Indian") composer, singer and [Filmi](/wiki/Filmi "Filmi") scorer. He was one of the music composer for the [bhangra](/wiki/Bhangra_(music) "Bhangra (music)") music group [RDB](/wiki/RDB_(band) "RDB (band)"), which was formed with his two brothers Surjeet Singh (SurjRDB) and Kuldeep Ral in 2001.

## Career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Manj_Musik&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Career")]

Manj Musik started his musical journey with [RDB](/wiki/RDB_(band) "RDB (band)") group singing at their local [gurudwara](/wiki/Gurudwara "Gurudwara").

After the death of his older brother Kuljeet Ral, Manj Musik decided to leave [RDB](/wiki/RDB_(band) "RDB (band)").[[1]](#cite_note-:1-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2) Beginning his solo career in 2014,[[3]](#cite_note-:0-3) he was awarded "Best Urban Single" at the [Brit Asia TV Music Awards](/wiki/Brit_Asia_TV_Music_Awards "Brit Asia TV Music Awards") for "Swag Mera Desi", which was performed by himself and [Raftaar](/wiki/Raftaar_(rapper) "Raftaar (rapper)").[[4]](#cite_note-BAMA2014-4)

Manj Musik began producing his own singles and also began to produce music in [Bollywood](/wiki/Bollywood "Bollywood"), and has worked with established actors such as [Saif Ali Khan](/wiki/Saif_Ali_Khan "Saif Ali Khan"), [Shahrukh Khan](/wiki/Shah_Rukh_Khan "Shah Rukh Khan") and [Akshay Kumar](/wiki/Akshay_Kumar "Akshay Kumar"), among others.[[5]](#cite_note-5) In 2014, Manj founded his own music label Muzik ONE Records.

## Muzik ONE records

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Manj_Musik&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Muzik ONE records")]

| Muzik ONE Records | |
| --- | --- |
| Founded | 2014 |
| Founder | Manj Musik |
| Status | Active |
| Country of origin | India |
| Location | [Mumbai](/wiki/Mumbai "Mumbai"), [Maharastra](/wiki/Maharastra "Maharastra") |

**Muzik ONE Records** is a [Mumbai](/wiki/Mumbai "Mumbai")-based record label founded by [British Indian](/wiki/British_Indian "British Indian") singer, music director, and [producer](/wiki/Record_producer "Record producer") Manj Musik in 2014. Later renamed as Muzik ONE Global, Manj described that the label is built to give full marketing, promotions and financial support to up and coming independent artists and not the label itself.[[6]](#cite_note-6) Previously, the roster included Vee Music, Abeer Arora, the Indian hip-hop crew **KKG** (Kala Kurta Gang), consisting of rappers Sikander Kahlon, Sady Immortal and Rob C, Moyur, O2 & SRK, Mr. Richi, Sarb Smooth, Nindy Kaur, Manj Musik, and [Raftaar](/wiki/Raftaar_(rapper) "Raftaar (rapper)").
